{{Infobox character
| name = King (The Traveler's Gate Trilogy)
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|seal Dragon's Fangs in the Vault}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|King}}
| appears_in = Traveler's Gate
| introduced = [[House of Blades (novel)|House of Blades]]
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Zakareth]] is the ruler of [[Damasca]] and a [[Traveler]] originating from Ragnarus. His lineage is significant, as only those of his bloodline possess the ability to open the Gate leading to his territory. Historically, the first [[King of Damasca]] utilized his [[Traveler]] abilities to secure the realm by sealing away a dangerous force. [[Zakareth]] has undergone a physical transformation through [[Incarnation]], resulting in skin marked with gold and [[ruby]] patterns, hair containing red or gold strands, a staff topped with a [[ruby]], and one eye replaced by a crimson fireball. In this state, he commands the [[Incarnations]] and seeks to bring [[Enosh]] under his control. Despite facing numerous opponents, including highly trained [[Travelers]] and [[Grandmasters]], he remains confident in his eventual return. His reign has been marked by personal turmoil, including the betrayal of his son and a daughter who was unprepared for her royal responsibilities.}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|The men [[Simon]] encountered were acting on orders from the King.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c5">''House of Blades'', chapter 5</ref>}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The King would want to hear the news [[Kai]] has.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c4">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The King is being distracted by [[Zakareth]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c16">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The King is dead.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c23">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The King has the ability to seal Dragon's Fangs in the [[Vault]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c24">''City of Light'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
